title: Multi-agent workflows often fail. Here’s how to engineer ones that don’t. — Practical Automation Insight
summary: Most multi-agent workflow failures come down to missing structure, not model capability. Learn the three engineering patterns that make agent systems reliable.

title: CarGurus data breach affects 12.5 million accounts — Practical Automation Insight
summary: Automotive marketplace CarGurus was the target of a data breach in which the names, email addresses, phone numbers, and physical addresses of millions of customers were stolen.

title: A Meta AI security researcher said an OpenClaw agent ran amok on her inbox — Practical Automation Insight
summary: The viral X post from an AI security researcher reads like satire. But it's really a word of warning about what can go wrong when handing tasks to an AI agent.

title: How AI agents could destroy the economy — Practical Automation Insight
summary: Citrini Research imagines a report from two years in the future, in which unemployment has doubled and the total value of the stock market has fallen by more than a third.

title: Samsung is adding Perplexity to Galaxy AI — Practical Automation Insight
summary: In addition to summoning Bixby or Gemini, Galaxy S26 users will be able to call on Perplexity by saying "hey, Plex." The integration of Perplexity into Galaxy AI is just one element of the company's embrace of a "multi-agent ecosystem." Of…

title: China’s brain-computer interface industry is racing ahead — Practical Automation Insight
summary: China’s brain-computer interface industry is rapidly scaling from research to commercialization, driven by strong policy support, expanding clinical trials, and growing investor interest.
